personal.name: Poloko Nkolanyane
personal.title: AI Native Software Mid-level Engineer
personal.tagline: Architecture-First Engineer | AI Enthusiast | Engineering Residency Mentor

about.summary: Backend-first Software Engineer specializing in scalable backend systems, API design, and software architecture. Experienced in Laravel, Express.js, Node.js, React, MySQL, and MongoDB, with hands-on experience building AI-powered applications and developing machine learning models using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Scikit-learn. Skilled in data analytics, model development, and integrating intelligent systems into production applications. Adept at translating complex business requirements into maintainable, high-performance software while applying modern engineering practices and analytics-driven decision-making. Passionate about architecting reliable systems, leveraging AI to solve real-world problems, and continuously mastering emerging tools and frameworks.

highlights: Technical Lead for the development of industry grade SaMMy social media and mention management platform
Conducted in-person meetings with the clients to gather requirements and provide technical solutions.
Main DevOps engineer for SaMMy, responsible for CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and deployment strategies.
Mentor students in AI-Native software engineering.
Lead lessons (Effiecent Engineer and Clean Code) and provide guidance on best practices.
Project advisory and code review for student projects, ensuring adherence to software engineering principles.
Lead and developed phase one of SaMMy a social media management platform using Next.js
Won the first prize in leadership and best technical capabilities during the internship program
Integrated X API, Linkedin API and Slack API for RAG pipelines and knowledge base.

projects.title: SaMMy Social Media Management and Mentions Platform
projects.description: I am a Tech Lead and part of the team developing SaMMy, a social media management and mentions platform.

projects.title: Litsamaiso
projects.description: I am part of the team and built API for an online platform that manages students financial accounts confirmations and elections for Institutions of Higher Learning.
